How It Works

Three steps. Zero guesswork.

1

Tag

Every vehicle and key gets a Bluetooth tracker. Scan the QR code, assign to stock — done.

2

Track

Your team sees every key and car's real-time location from their phone or desktop.

3

Manage

Run audits, get movement alerts, see who last had a key, integrate with your DMS.

What You Get

Built for real dealership operations.

Real-Time Key Location

See exactly where every key is — on a desk, in a pocket, across the lot. No more key boxes that are only as good as the last person.

Vehicle Location Across All Lots

Track every car across multiple properties. Know instantly if a vehicle moved, where it went, and when.

After-Hours Movement Alerts

Get instant notifications when vehicles move outside geofenced areas or during off-hours. Full accountability, 24/7.

DMS Integration

Syncs with Reynolds & Reynolds, CDK, and more. Stock numbers, VINs, and vehicle profiles auto-populate.

Daily Audit Tools

Simplify floor plan audits with instant location verification. Know where every unit is without walking the lot.

Key Accountability Tracking

See who last checked out a key and where it went. Eliminate finger-pointing and build real accountability.
